rules.name: local_only
rules.description: Queries read Stage151 local JSONL records only.

rules.name: deterministic_scoring
rules.description: Ranking uses lexical overlap, field priority, temporal metadata, simple rank fusion, and boundary penalty.

rules.name: provider_zero
rules.description: No provider call is allowed for query or ranking.

rules.name: write_blocked
rules.description: Query APIs cannot write or mutate memory records.
